items.title: scikit-learn — OneHotEncoder
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Reference for sparse/dense one-hot output, `handle_unknown`, and pipeline integration.

items.title: scikit-learn — OrdinalEncoder
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Maps categories to integers when explicit level order is supplied via `categories`.

items.title: scikit-learn — ColumnTransformer
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Applies different encoders per column inside a single fit/transform pipeline.

items.title: Category Encoders library
items.author: category_encoders contributors
items.note: Target, ordinal, and other encoders with smoothing options—use only with train-only fitting and CV discipline.
